title: Vine Pressure Exam
intendedTensionBeat: Vine threatens to tax the efficient route if ignored.
intendedReleaseBeat: Clipping vine early keeps the shortcut open and confirms the player understands future cost.
expectedPath: Clip the authored vine lane early enough to preserve the rescue route, then complete the urgent rescue.
expectedFailMode: Player lets vine grow, then becomes action-starved or dock-stressed while rerouting.
designNotes: Vine must support rescue order, not become a side mechanic.
